data.title: CertiK Targets IPO to Become Web3’s First Public Security Infrastructure Firm
data.description:
Blockchain security firm CertiK is preparing for a potential public listing, signaling a major shift in how Web3 infrastructure companies position themselves within global capital markets. Speaking at the World Economic Forum in Davos on January 23, 2026, CertiK founder Ronghui Gu confirmed that the company is actively working toward an Initial Public Offering.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/certik-targets-ipo-to-become-web3s-first-public-security-infrastructure-firm/

data.title: Oklahoma Legislature Introduces Bitcoin Payment Bill
data.description:
Oklahoma lawmakers have introduced Senate Bill 2064, a proposal that would allow state employees, private businesses, and individuals to accept and make payments in Bitcoin under defined conditions. The bill was introduced on January 15 and is currently under consideration in committee. com
source: https://www.techgaged.com/oklahoma-legislature-introduces-bitcoin-payment-bill/

data.title: Remittances ‘more important than aid’ as Africa turns to stablecoins
data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/remittances-more-important-than-aid-africa-stablecoins?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: UK's FCA Advances Crypto Regulation with Final Consumer Duty Consultation
data.description: The UK's Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) is advancing its efforts to regulate the cryptocurrency sector by initiating its final consultation on consumer duty. According to NS3.AI, the FCA stresses the importance of crypto firms prioritizing fair outcomes for customers while also encouraging innovation. This initiative seeks to enhance consumer protection within the UK's crypto market without hindering technological progress.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary Shifts Focus from Cryptocurrencies to Energy Infrastructure
data.description: Investor Kevin O’Leary has announced a strategic shift from cryptocurrencies to investments in energy infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, O’Leary perceives power generation as holding more value than Bitcoin in the present market environment. This move reflects his preference for tangible assets over digital tokens, highlighting the changing dynamics within the market.

data.title: Significant Ethereum Transfer from Fidelity Custody to Anonymous Address
data.description: A large transfer of Ethereum has been reported, involving 20,000 ETH moving from Fidelity Custody to an anonymous address. According to ChainCatcher, this transaction occurred at 04:21, with the receiving address beginning with 0xF16f.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary says power is now more valuable than bitcoin
data.description:
Kevin O'Leary asserts that in today's economic landscape, the significance of energy and power resources has surged to a level that surpasses the value of bitcoin, indicating a potential shift in investment priorities and highlighting the increasing importance of sustainable energy solutions in the financial market.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/01/23/kevin-o-leary-says-power-is-now-more-valuable-than-bitcoin

data.title: Intel's Stock Drops Amid Disappointing Q1 2026 Forecast
data.description: Intel's stock experienced a significant decline of over 17% after the company's Q1 2026 revenue and earnings forecast failed to meet analyst expectations. According to NS3.AI, while Intel's Q4 2025 results surpassed estimates, ongoing supply chain challenges are anticipated to impact production, leading to earnings reaching breakeven. Despite the short-term outlook setback, investors maintain optimism regarding Intel's long-term growth potential in the AI sector.
